# Deep Knowledge Tracing Model
import torch
import torch.nn as nn

class DKTModel(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, hidden_size=32, num_layers=1, dropout=0.3):
        super(DKTModel, self).__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.hidden_size = hidden_size
        self.num_layers = num_layers
        
        # Embedding layer for skills
        self.skill_embedding = nn.Embedding(num_skills, hidden_size)
        
        # Embedding layer for correctness (0 or 1)
        self.correctness_embedding = nn.Embedding(2, hidden_size)
        
        # LSTM layer
        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(hidden_size * 2, hidden_size, num_layers, 
                            batch_first=True, dropout=dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0)
        
        # Output layer
        self.output_layer = nn.Linear(hidden_size, 1)
        self.sigmoid = nn.Sigmoid()
        
        # Dropout
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):
        batch_size, seq_len = skill_ids.size()
        
        # Embed skills and correctness
        skill_embedded = self.skill_embedding(skill_ids)
        correctness_embedded = self.correctness_embedding(corrects.long())
        
        # Concatenate embeddings
        inputs = torch.cat([skill_embedded, correctness_embedded], dim=-1)
        
        # Pass through LSTM
        lstm_out, _ = self.lstm(inputs)
        
        # Apply dropout
        lstm_out = self.dropout(lstm_out)
        
        # Pass through output layer
        outputs = self.output_layer(lstm_out)
        
        # Apply sigmoid activation
        outputs = self.sigmoid(outputs)
        
        # Return outputs excluding the last position (we predict next step)
        return outputs.squeeze(-1)[:, 1:]  # Remove singleton dimension and exclude first position
